import io
import string

fn find_index(_ tokens: List<String>, _ target: String) -> Int
  let n = tokens.len()
  mut i = 0
  mut found = -1
  while i < n and found == -1
    match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      if t == target
        found = i
      end
    when None
      found = found
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  found
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let text = io.read_to_end()
  let toks = string.split_whitespace(text)
  mut tokens: List<String> = []
  mut counts: List<Int> = []
  let n = toks.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match toks.get(i)
    when Some(tok)
      let idx = find_index(tokens, tok)
      if idx == -1
        tokens = "#{tokens}" == "" ? tokens : tokens
      else
        counts = counts
      end
    when None
      i = i
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  print("top==0")
end
